text: //26, :48 PM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system EOM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System – Haryana STATE 🎯 Farmer 🎯 Women 🎯 Entrepreneur 🎯 Skill Overview Eligibility Benefits How to Apply References Details PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana is flagship aquaculture subsidy initiative designed to promote modern fish farming infrastructure in the state. Under this component of the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY), capital assistance is provided to fish farmers and entrepreneurs for setting up medium-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems. This scheme supports high-density fish production using advanced, water-efficient, and space-saving aquaculture technologies, making it ideal for progressive fish farmers in Haryana. About PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana Launched by the Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of India, this scheme aims to modernize the fisheries sector by promoting sustainable aquaculture practices. The scheme operates under 50:50 cost-sharing model between the Central Government and the State Government of Haryana. Technical Specifications For applicants choosing the RAS model: https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/eom/ /
source: PMMSY_ Establishment of Medium RAS _ Biofloc culture system.pdf

text: //26, :48 PM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system Minimum tanks Each tank of 30 cubic meters capacity Production capacity: 10 tons per crop For applicants opting for the Biofloc model: 25 tanks Each tank of -meter diameter and -meter height These systems ensure efficient water recycling, controlled feeding, and improved fish survival rates. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/eom/ /

text: //26, :48 PM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system Financial Assistance and Subsidy Structure Under PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana, the total approved project cost is: ₹25,00,000 Subsidy Pattern 40% subsidy for General Category beneficiaries 60% subsidy for SC and Women beneficiaries This subsidy structure significantly reduces the financial burden on eligible applicants and encourages inclusive participation in modern aquaculture. Eligibility Criteria for PMMSY RAS / Biofloc Scheme in Haryana To apply under this scheme, applicants must fulfill the following conditions: Must be permanent resident of Haryana Must possess valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) Must own land or have registered lease agreement valid for at least 10 years The land must be free from legal or financial disputes Must have access to reliable water source such as canal, tube well, or river Must possess valid training certificate in fisheries or aquaculture https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/eom/ /
source: PMMSY_ Establishment of Medium RAS _ Biofloc culture system.pdf

text: //26, :48 PM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system Must agree to operate and maintain the system at personal cost after establishment Must submit Detailed Project Report (DPR) or Self-Contained Proposal (SCP) Must sign formal agreement with the Department of Fisheries Meeting these eligibility requirements is mandatory to avail subsidy benefits. How to Apply for PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana Applications can be submitted online through the Antyodaya-SARAL Portal. Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal Step : Visit the official Antyodaya-SARAL portal. Step : Click on “New User/Register Here” and enter required details such as Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, and Password. Step : Verify the OTP sent to your registered email and mobile number to activate your profile. Login and Apply for the Scheme Step : Visit the Antyodaya-SARAL portal. Step : Click on “Sign in here” and log in using your credentials. Step : Select “Scheme/Services List” from the dashboard. Step : Choose PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/eom/ /
source: PMMSY_ Establishment of Medium RAS _ Biofloc culture system.pdf

text: //26, :48 PM PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system Step : Click on “Apply for Service/Scheme,” complete the application form, and submit. How to Track Application Status Applicants can track their service status using the following methods: Online Tracking Track Application/Appeal via the portal Track Ticket through the portal dashboard SMS Tracking From registered mobile number: Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 From other mobile numbers: Type SARAL and send to 9954699899 Service Charges and Fees Government Charges: No Fee Online Service Charges: ₹10 Atal Seva Kendra Service Charges: ₹10 Applicants may also apply offline through the nearest Atal Seva Kendra by submitting required documents. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/eom/ /
source: PMMSY_ Establishment of Medium RAS _ Biofloc culture system.pdf

Why PMMSY RAS / Biofloc Scheme is Important for Haryana Fish Farmers The PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc Culture System - Haryana plays vital role in boosting fish production through scientific aquaculture methods. By promoting RAS and Biofloc systems, the scheme enhances productivity, minimizes water usage, reduces environmental impact, and increases farmer income.
